title: orobanche minor var. bovei
intro: Orobanche minor var. bovei, also known as Bistort Broomrape, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Orobanche minor var. bovei include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of kidney stones. Orobanche minor var. bovei can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
